description_long: This is a wide, cylindrical ring with a deep green, glossy finish and intricate, swirling patterns carved into its outer surface. The band is thick and robust, with the decorative motifs giving it a sense of movement and organic flow. The interior is smooth and unadorned, providing comfort for the wearer. The material appears to be a polished, semi-translucent stone, possibly jade or a similar gemstone, lending the piece a luxurious and elegant appearance. The overall craftsmanship is high, with precise, well-defined engravings and a uniform sheen. The ring's bold design and rich color make it a striking accessory suitable for both everyday wear and special occasions.
description: A wide, glossy green ring with intricate swirling carvings and a polished, luxurious finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the ring and highlights the swirling carved patterns on the outer surface.
description_view_1: Top-down view reveals the smooth, circular interior and the thickness of the band.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirrors the front, displaying the same detailed carvings and glossy finish.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view again shows the smooth, open interior and the ring's substantial thickness.
